input.headline: Erasmus open to Nienaber return for Rugby World Cup

raw.headline: Erasmus open to Nienaber return for Rugby World Cup

winner: Why did the classical philosopher bring back his old coach for the Rugby World Cup? Because he figured Erasmus knew all the plays from Nienaber's "In Praise of Famous Coaches" textbook!

candidates.text: Why did Erasmus invite Nienaber back for the Rugby World Cup? Because he wanted a second bite at the cherry coach!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat forced and relies on a pun that may not be immediately clear to all audiences. It lacks specificity in connecting Erasmus and Nienaber's context to the Rugby World Cup, and the humor feels generic rather than surprising or concise."}

candidates.text: Ah, so Erasmus is considering bringing back Nienaber just in time for the Rugby World Cup. I suppose they're hoping a dash of history will add a bit more excitement to the games.
